L.-33004/99 4411(14 3aq-4T -fft Berri!, 1 HIf, 2002 W.311'. 268( 31 *Nif TiTUDI I ( 2001 .TT 52) ttITTT 1 *I. 31:11471 (3) -gTZT 1;17 71f" ritri c4-) 7, 1 TTT4, 2002 *1 37,i (04* -14 fiqd dcict 3T*4f1c144 %MT 114 WU 29 TrziF tTRT NTZT 62 WW* dtitiq 51ctki i14 i [71. 13/2/2001 - 4 44( ST 9, fqtt Hr•ctel MINISTRY OF POWER NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st March, 2002 S.O. 268(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) of section I of the Energy Conservation Act, 2001 (52 of 2001), the Central Government hereby appoints the 1st day of March, 2002 as the date on which the provisions of sections 1 to 29 and 46 to 62 of the said Act shall come into force. [F. No. 13/2/2001-EM(i)) S. PRABHAKARAN, Spl. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Govt. of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, Nev Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications.
